query_title: Mark Felt: The Man Who Brought Down the White House

recommendations.title: BlackBerry
recommendations.overview: Two mismatched entrepreneurs – egghead innovator Mike Lazaridis and cut-throat businessman Jim Balsillie – joined forces in an endeavour that was to become a worldwide hit in little more than a decade. The story of the meteoric rise and catastrophic

recommendations.title: The Electrical Life of Louis Wain
recommendations.overview: The extraordinary true story of eccentric British artist Louis Wain, whose playful, sometimes even psychedelic pictures helped to transform the public's perception of cats forever.

recommendations.title: Bob Marley: One Love
recommendations.overview: Jamaican singer-songwriter Bob Marley overcomes adversity to become the most famous reggae musician in the world.

recommendations.title: Deep Sea
recommendations.overview: Shenxiu has felt a deep sadness since her mother left. A storm plunges her into a dreamlike world of swirling colour. Led by the Hyjinx, and joined by inventive underwater chef Nanhe, she embarks on a quest to find solace in the Eye of the Deep Sea.

recommendations.title: The Joker is Wild
recommendations.overview: A Prohibition-era nightclub crooner has his career is cut short when his throat is slashed by a mob boss.

recommendations.title: Shock and Awe
recommendations.overview: A group of journalists covering George Bush's planned invasion of Iraq in 2003 are skeptical of the presidents claim that Saddam Hussein has "weapons of mass destruction."

recommendations.title: Speed Kills
recommendations.overview: Speedboat racing champion and multimillionaire Ben Aronoff leads a double life that lands him in trouble with the law and drug lords.

recommendations.title: Spotlight
recommendations.overview: The true story of how the Boston Globe uncovered the massive scandal of child molestation and cover-up within the local Catholic Archdiocese, shaking the entire Catholic Church to its core.

recommendations.title: She Said
recommendations.overview: New York Times reporters Megan Twohey and Jodi Kantor break one of the most important stories in a generation — a story that helped launch the #MeToo movement and shattered decades of silence around the subject of sexual assault in Hollywood.

recommendations.title: The Mattei Affair
recommendations.overview: Enrico Mattei helped change Italy’s future, first as freedom-fighter against the Nazis, then as an investor in methane gas through a public company, A.G.I.P., and ultimately as the head of ENI, a state body formed for the development of oil resources
